_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: We first evaluated the percentage of PC12 differentiated cells according to neurite generation 72 h after NGF treatment
details: Successfully used for quantification of differentiated cells and analysis of neurite formation in PC12 cell differentiation experiments
